title: Analytics - Firmware Update Started
scenario: Verify that after starting a DFU process, the "firmware_update_started" event is logged and the Firebase dashboard displays default elements plus Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, and Target Language ID, with event counts increasing after a few hours.
steps: Verify that default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Verify that additional elements are displayed: Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID.
Start a DFU (firmware update) process on a device.
Check the event count for the related elements and confirm it has increased.
expected: The Firebase dashboard displays all default elements plus the additional elements (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID). After starting a DFU process, the event count for related elements increases after a few hours.
